---
title: "India"
geometry: margin=1in
output: pdf_document
header-includes:
  - |
    ```{=latex}
    \usepackage[table]{xcolor}
    \expandafter\def\csname ver@subfig.sty\endcsname{}
    \usepackage{graphicx,subcaption}
    \makeatletter\@ifundefined{subfloat}{\newcommand{\subfloat}[2][need a sub-caption]{\subcaptionbox{#1}{#2} }}{\renewcommand{\subfloat}[2][need a sub-caption]{\subcaptionbox{#1}{#2} }}\makeatother
    ```
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::knit_hooks$set(margins = Pmisc::hook_plot_margins)
knitr::knit_hooks$set(plot = knitr::hook_plot_tex)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, prompt = TRUE, comment = NA,
  dev = "pdf", margins = 1, fig.cap = " ", fig.pos = "hp",
  fig.path = file.path("figure", "moreBayes"),
  fig.width = 5, fig.height = 5, half = NULL,
  tidy = TRUE, tidy.opts = list(indent = 2, width.cutoff = 45)
)

options(width = 80)
```


```{r ecoRegionData}
s_store_dir <- c("/store/patrick/copernicus/agg", "~/Downloads/agg")
store_dir <- s_store_dir[1]
if (!dir.exists(store_dir)) store_dir <- s_store_dir[2]

india_eco_regions <- terra::unwrap(readRDS(file.path(store_dir, "indiaEcoRegions.rds")))
india_eco_regions$name <- gsub(
  " AND ", ", ",
  gsub(" E.O.REGION|[(].*[)]|TO PERHUMID.*|PENINSULA ", "", india_eco_regions$physio_reg)
)
india_eco_regions$id_name <- paste(india_eco_regions$objectid, india_eco_regions$name)

india_eco_regions$col <- rep_len(
  c(
    RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Set3"),
    RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(8, "Set2")
  ),
  length(india_eco_regions)
)


# objectid is deaths$eco_region
```

```{r worldPopByRegion, cache=TRUE}
year <- 2020
dir.create("data/gpw", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# geodata::population returns GPW population density (people per km^2)
pop_density <- geodata::population(year, res = 5, path = "data/gpw")

eco <- terra::project(india_eco_regions, terra::crs(pop_density))

pop_density_india_eco <- terra::crop(pop_density, eco)
pop_density_india_eco <- terra::mask(pop_density_india_eco, eco)

# Convert density to estimated population count per cell before extraction.
cell_area_km2 <- terra::cellSize(pop_density_india_eco, unit = "km")
pop_count <- pop_density_india_eco * cell_area_km2

eco_pop <- terra::extract(
  pop_count,
  eco,
  fun = sum,
  na.rm = TRUE,
  exact = TRUE
)

eco$gpw_2020 <- eco_pop[, 2]

eco_pop_df <- data.frame(
  objectid = eco$objectid,
  physio_reg = eco$physio_reg,
  gpw_2020 = eco$gpw_2020
)

eco_pop_df$weight <- eco_pop_df$gpw_2020 / sum(eco_pop_df$gpw_2020)
```



```{r deaths_data, eval=FALSE}
library("data.table")
# /home/patrick/Admin/globalHealth/indiaSpatial/daily.Rmd

deaths <- as.data.table(readRDS(file.path(store_dir, "indiaCC.rds")))
data.table::setnames(
  deaths,
  old = c("ecoRegion", "yearWeek3Dow"),
  new = c("eco_region", "year_week3_dow"),
  skip_absent = TRUE
)

# trransform variables
deaths$sqrt_pm <- sqrt(pmin(deaths$pm, 1000))
deaths$time_iid <- as.numeric(deaths$date)

deaths$temp_clean <- pmax(deaths$temp, -5)


deaths$dom <- as.numeric(format(deaths$date, "%d"))
deaths[deaths$dom == Hmisc::monthDays(deaths$date), "dom"] <- 31
deaths[format(deaths$date, "%m%d") == "0101", "dom"] <- 0
deaths$dom <- droplevels(relevel(factor(deaths$dom), "1"))
deaths$month <- format(deaths$date, "%m")

save(deaths, file = "deaths.RData")
```




```{r fit, eval=FALSE}
library("hpolcc")
load("deaths.RData")

res_pm_temp_r <- hpolcc::hnlm(
  formula = medical ~ dom +
    f(sqrt_pm,
      model = "hiwp", ref_value = 8, p = 2,
      knots = seq(0, 32, by = 2),
      group_var = eco_region
    ) +
    f(temp_clean,
      model = "hiwp", ref_value = 15, p = 3,
      knots = seq(-5, 30, by = 2.5),
      group_var = eco_region
    ),
  data = deaths[
    which(
      deaths$date > as.Date("2006/1/1")
    ),
  ],
  cc_design = c("cell", "eco_region", "year_week3_dow"),
  config = list(
    transform_theta = TRUE,
    dirichlet = TRUE,
    boundary_is_random = TRUE,
    num_threads = parallel::detectCores(),
    verbose = FALSE
  ),
  control = list(
    maxit = 1000,
    report.level = 4,
    report.freq = 1
  )
)

saveRDS(res_pm_temp_r, file = "resPmTempR.rds")
```




```{r theResults, include=FALSE}
library("hpolcc")
res = readRDS("resPmTemp.rds")
res$parameters$theta
res$parameters$beta
str(res$sample$sim)
sim_global <- res$sample$sim
pred_seq <- res$sample$x$predSeq
```



```{r regionSetup}
s_group <- setdiff(unique(res$objects$gamma_info$group), c(NA, "GLOBAL"))
s_region_name <-
  india_eco_regions$physio_reg[match(s_group, india_eco_regions$objectid)]
gamma_info <- res$objects$gamma_info
pop_weighted <- as.list(rep(0, length(unique(gamma_info$var))))
names(pop_weighted) <- unique((gamma_info$var))
```


```{r byRegionTemplateOld, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
x_here <- res$sample$x$predSeq[[d_var]]

if (grepl("sqrt", d_var)) x_here <- x_here^2

a_here <- res$sample$XA[[d_var]]$A
sim_global_here <- res$sample$sim[[d_var]]

sim_global_here_y <- 100 * (exp(sim_global_here) - 1)
sim_global_here_yq <- t(apply(sim_global_here_y, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.025, 0.975, 0.5)))

y_lim_here <- range(sim_global_here_y)
x_lim_here <- range(x_here)

for (d_group in s_group) {
  gamma_here <- gamma_info[
    which(gamma_info$var == d_var & gamma_info$group == d_group),
  ]
  a_here_new_names <-
    gsub("_GLOBAL_", paste0("_", d_group, "_"), colnames(a_here))
  a_here_new_names <-
    gsub("_fpoly_", paste0("_hrpoly_", d_group, "_"), a_here_new_names)
  if (!all(a_here_new_names %in% gamma_here$name)) {
    warning("missing stuff")
    print(setdiff(a_here_new_names, gamma_here$name))
  }
  gamma_sim_here <- res$sample$gamma[gamma_here$gamma_id, ]
  a_here <- a_here[, match(gamma_here$name, a_here_new_names)]
  sim_here_r <- a_here %*% gamma_sim_here
  sim_here <- sim_here_r + sim_global_here
  sim_here <- 100 * (exp(sim_here) - 1)

  pop_weighted[[d_var]] <- pop_weighted[[d_var]] +
    eco_pop_df[which(eco_pop_df$objectid == d_group), "weight"] * sim_here

  the_yq <- t(apply(sim_here, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.025, 0.975, 0.5)))

  matplot(x_here, sim_here,
    type = "l",
    xlab = d_var, ylab = "100 x (RR-1)",
    col = "#00000010", lty = 1, xaxs = "i",
    ylim = y_lim_here, xlim = x_lim_here
  )
  matlines(x_here, sim_global_here_yq,
    lty = c(2, 2, 1), lwd = c(1, 1, 3), col = "red"
  )
  matlines(x_here, the_yq, lty = c(2, 2, 1), lwd = c(1, 1, 2), col = "green")
}
```

```{r byRegionSetup1}
d_var <- grep("temp", unique(gamma_info$var), value = TRUE)
```

```{r byRegion1, fig.cap=gsub("sqrt", "", d_var), fig.subcap = s_group, fig.height=4, fig.width=4, ref.label = 'byRegionTemplate', eval=(length(d_var)>0), out.width='0.23\\linewidth', fig.align='center'}
```

```{r byRegionSetup2}
d_var <- grep("[pP]m$", unique(gamma_info$var), value = TRUE)
```

```{r byRegion2, fig.cap=gsub("sqrt","",d_var), fig.subcap = s_group, fig.height=4, fig.width=4, ref.label = 'byRegionTemplate', eval=(length(d_var)>0), out.width='0.23\\linewidth', fig.align='center'}
```


```{r globalSetup}
s_var <- names(res$sample$sim)
s_var_names <- c(temp_clean = "temperature", sqrt_pm = "PM2.5")[s_var]
the_x_lim <- list(
  temp_clean = c(4, 38),
  sqrt_pm = c(0, 450)
)
for_global <- expand.grid(
  var = s_var,
  type = c("Common", "Pop Avg"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
for_global$var_name <- s_var_names[for_global$var]
for_global$subcap <- paste(for_global$var_name, for_global$type)

for_y_lim <- lapply(
  pop_weighted,
  function(xx) apply(xx, 1, quantile, c(0.03, 0.97))
)

for (d in names(for_y_lim)) {
  x_here <- res$sample$x$predSeq[[d]]
  if (grepl("sqrt", d)) x_here <- x_here^2

  for_y_lim[[d]] <- for_y_lim[[d]][
    ,
    x_here <= max(the_x_lim[[d]]) &
      x_here >= min(the_x_lim[[d]])
  ]
}
the_y_lim <- lapply(for_y_lim, function(xx) range(c(-2, xx)))
```


```{r globalRes, fig.cap='Common component', fig.subcap = for_global$subcap, out.width='0.48\\linewidth', fig.height=5, fig.width=5}
par(mar = c(3, 3, 0, 0), bty = "l")

for (d in seq_len(nrow(for_global))) {
  d_var <- for_global[d, "var"]

  if (for_global[d, "type"] == "Common") {
    avg_here <- 100 * (exp(res$sample$sim[[d_var]]) - 1)
  } else {
    avg_here <- pop_weighted[[d_var]]
  }


  x_here <- res$sample$x$predSeq[[d_var]]
  if (grepl("sqrt", d_var)) x_here <- x_here^2

  the_yq <- t(apply(avg_here, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.025, 0.975, 0.5)))

  y_lim_here <- the_y_lim[[d_var]]
  x_lim_here <- the_x_lim[[d_var]]


  matplot(x_here, avg_here,
    type = "l",
    xlab = s_var_names[d_var], ylab = "100 x (RR-1)",
    col = "#00000010", lty = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i",
    ylim = y_lim_here, xlim = x_lim_here
  )

  matlines(x_here, the_yq, lty = c(2, 2, 1), lwd = c(1, 1, 2), col = "red")
}
```




```{r ecoRegionmap, fig.cap = 'Eco regions', fig.subcap = c('reginos','legend') ,fig.height=5, fig.width=5, out.width = '0.48\\linewidth'}
mapmisc::map.new(india_eco_regions)
terra::plot(india_eco_regions, add = TRUE, col = india_eco_regions$col)
terra::text(terra::centroids(india_eco_regions), india_eco_regions$objectid)

mapmisc::map.new(india_eco_regions)
mapmisc::legendBreaks(
  "left",
  col = rev(india_eco_regions$col),
  legend = rev(india_eco_regions$id_name),
  cex = 0.7, bty = "n", width = Inf
)
```


```{r ecoTable, results='asis', include=FALSE}
knitr::kable(
  mapmisc::legendTable(data.frame(
    label = india_eco_regions$id_name,
    col = india_eco_regions$col
  ), type = "latex"),
  format = "latex", escape = FALSE,
  align = c("c", "l"),
  col.names = c("", "Eco region"),
  caption = "Eco-regions used in the analysis"
) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped"),
    full_width = FALSE,
    font_size = 9
  ) |>
  kableExtra::column_spec(1, latex_column_spec = "p{0.05\\\\linewidth}") |>
  kableExtra::column_spec(2, latex_column_spec = "p{0.7\\\\linewidth}")
```
